entry.title: provenciality and death
entry.content:
It is customary for those that occupy provencial milieux to minimize the ubiquity of death, to swiftly relieve and liquidate DEATH as some foreign element (excrement). Of course, we may recourse to Zizek’s arguments regarding European toilets, but it is sufficient to notice the intensity of importance paid to births and funerals—rather mundane physical processes, from an unbothered inhuman or angelic view (in the sense that the heavens should apparently be rather unmoved by present world atrocities to not intervene), are elevated to some yet still, by supposed “rational beings,” strange mystical and ritualistic significance. The absence of myths is precisely the myth of the modern provencial subject, largely determined by social scripts, unable to express their lack of autonomy or their unfreedom by the illusion that they are exempt from the primal mythological impulse that generates mythos (narrativization) in the first place.

The direct experience of death was had by humanity at large since time immemorial—not only does one reap grains with the scythe, becoming the image of death (the “grim reaper”) to arrive by empathy with the lively upward movement of plants starting in the agrarian age, but was had in previously ages as well: Soon after the hunt, one finds that to slit the throat an of animal and drain its blood was the most efficient means of consumption. The empathy with the sacrificed animal became self-deception—to be constituted by death everywhere, rather shamefully tearing into animal and vegetal bodies, meant that we are constituted exactly by what contradicted our own self-conception or ‘identity’—our own death must be identified with that of the lively and animate, or ensouled beings, just as their death is identified with our life.

… to read the rest of this—you mustn’t because you can’t. regardless, no patreon set up yet.
entry.summary: It is customary for those that occupy provencial milieux to minimize the ubiquity of death, to swiftly relieve and liquidate DEATH as some foreign element (excrement). Of course, we may recourse to Zizek’s arguments regarding European toilets, but it is sufficient to notice the intensity of importance paid to births and funerals—rather mundane physical processes, from an unbothered inhuman or angelic view (in the sense that the heavens should apparently be rather unmoved by present world atrocities to not intervene), are elevated to some yet still, by supposed “rational beings,” strange mystical and ritualistic significance. The absence of myths is precisely the myth of the modern provencial subject, largely determined by social scripts, unable to express their lack of autonomy or their unfreedom by the illusion that they are exempt from the primal mythological impulse that generates mythos (narrativization) in the first place.

entry.title: new site incoming
entry.content:
hello bro, welcome to some garbage you were never meant to see. since we LARP aristocratic virtues, we can’t not own (virutal) property, being virtually a landed gentry (LARP, due to decreased standards of living, i.e., dying!) Only freaky serfs can chill exclusivlely on social media platforms (although, admittedly, this is hosted on github-pages right now, owned by microslop, so this site is part of their weird little AI-slop sourced digital fiefdom. Codeberg pages’s custom domain was seemingly too slow for a pre-release site, so we had to go with the more micro-sloppy solution.)

Anyways, all of this garbage will be gone soon once we switch up the means of deployment, so it doesn’t matter anyways (so wut up my n__, sorry i meant to type, my fellow noble, since u probably have the means to have ur own site m8.) Anyways, take back some means of digital production and become a petit bourgeoise class traitor woke reactionary, bro, maybe behind a patreon or substack if u must, it’s the only way.

All jokes aside it’s all very serious and we’re so back, you didn’t even know what u’re missing m8. Get ready for some digital tarrifs, paywalls, u pathetic nobody garbage person. u get limited access to whatever garbage natural intelligence slop plops on this feed by dubiously secure means (no worries, we’ll probably get an uncaptcha intelligence slop filter, where we make sure you’re not human, or more exactly inhuman.) Anyways, even more seriously: read, read, read.
entry.summary: hello bro, welcome to some garbage you were never meant to see. since we LARP aristocratic virtues, we can’t not own (virutal) property, being virtually a landed gentry (LARP, due to decreased standards of living, i.e., dying!) Only freaky serfs can chill exclusivlely on social media platforms (although, admittedly, this is hosted on github-pages right now, owned by microslop, so this site is part of their weird little AI-slop sourced digital fiefdom. Codeberg pages’s custom domain was seemingly too slow for a pre-release site, so we had to go with the more micro-sloppy solution.)
